description: The 'Ndrina Iannazzo is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in Lamezia Terme. It is allied with the Giampà and Cannizzaro-Daponte clans. The group has been involved in a long-running feud with the Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra clan, resulting in dozens of murders. It has also infiltrated public contracts, including the modernization of the A3 motorway, and has been linked to political corruption. In 2022, assets worth €800 million were seized from its associates.
